name: extension_in_public
title: Extension in Public
description: Detects extensions installed in the \`public\` schema.
detail: Extension \`vector\` is installed in the public schema. Move it to another schema.

name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.ab_assignments` has an RLS policy `ab_assign_insert_any` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for -.

name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True

detail: Table `public.ab_events` has an RLS policy `ab_events_insert_any` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for -.

name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.web_vitals` has an RLS policy `web_vitals_insert_any` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for -.

name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
title: Public Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable without signing in. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if it is not meant to be public.
detail: Function `public.inc_blog_view(p_article_id uuid)` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/inc_blog_view`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

detail: Function `public.inc_forum_view(p_thread_id uuid)` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/inc_forum_view`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable
title: Signed-In Users Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable by signed-in users. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if signed-in users should not call it.
detail: Function `public.claim_quest_reward(p_quest_id uuid)` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/claim_quest_reward`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.
